content.en:
"The fourth sequence of Dao rules has reached the realm of four into six!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that a Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone would be able to allow him to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to this realm.

If you get some more Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stones, you can definitely comprehend the rules of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao to the realm of ten percent.

But such a treasure is extremely rare, and it would be too difficult to get another one!

......

"Straight Mission!"

Ye Tian received a notice from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, asking him to complete a direct mission.

The official members of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, every million solstice eras, have to complete a task, which is the rule of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, but almost all of them just choose a simple task.

For example, guarding an area, and so on.

However, there are special circumstances, such as an urgent matter somewhere, and many full members are reluctant to go, then the mission must be forcibly dispatched.

This kind of mission is a direct mission!

Ye Tian didn't expect to be assigned a direct assignment.

Mission: Mix into the Heavenly Blood of the Dao Void Demon and kill Dandi Xu Guang, mission time limit: 6,000 to the Dao Era

"Mixed into the Heavenly Blood of the Dao Void Demon, is the Innate Origin Domain Alliance crazy?"

Ye Tian immediately applied to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to cancel this mission.

However, it wasn't long before the Innate Origin Alliance replied.

You can choose to discard, but the task cannot be canceled. "

Ye Tian knew very well what the consequences of giving up the mission would be, that is, to continue to forcibly send the mission.

The second direct mission is almost always an impossible task, if you give up the three direct missions, you will be deprived of the status of a full member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and nothing else.

But losing the official membership of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, many things are inconvenient.

For example, he had no way to enter the Supreme Void, nor could he participate in Elder Gu Yang's auction, it was difficult to obtain information, and so on.

"Go and ask the Su Domain Lord to see what the situation is, I am in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of the Strongest Dao Path, it stands to reason that the Innate Origin Domain Alliance attaches great importance to me, and I should not be directly assigned a task. "

Ye Tian contacted the Su Domain Lord and informed him of the situation.

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian and Su Ya met.

"Domain Lord Su, do you know what my mission is all about?" Ye Tian asked.

Su Ya nodded: "I used the relationship between the Su people, and I finally understood that it was the Qin family who did it." The direct mission is in charge of an elder of the Qin clan, and this time the Qin clan has specified that you will take this task. Even if you abandon this task, there will be other impossible tasks. "

"Qin Clan, could it be that he was the one who competed with me last time for the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone's Ninefold Dao Realm, and he was the one who caused trouble?" Ye Tian said.

"That's right, it's Qin Ming of the Qin clan, it's he who is looking for that elder with the purpose of making you lose your official membership. Once you lose your official membership, according to the regulations of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, only those who have surpassed the Nine Folds to the Dao Realm can be eligible to join the Innate Origin Domain Alliance again. Su Ya said helplessly.

This rule is silent, but this is the rule of those old monsters, and no one can change it.

"Qin Ming, I remember you!" Ye Tian thought about how to deal with this task, should he give up, or try to complete it?

"Who is Dandi Xu Guang?"

Ye Tian asked.

Su Ya passed on the information about Xu Guang to Ye Tian.

"It turned out to be an eightfold Supreme Dao realm of the Xu clan!" Ye Tian was surprised.

On the side of the Dao Void Demon, there are even traitors from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Su Ya said: "Xu Guang is very powerful, although his combat power is not strong, but his research ability is very demonic, and he has created countless secret medicines, and it is said that he is now creating a secret medicine that can allow the Supreme Dao Void Demon to improve his bloodline." Once successful, the bloodline of the Supreme Dao Void Demon can be easily improved, and it is even possible to easily cultivate the Supreme Dao Void Demon of the Supreme Bloodline. If that kind of secret medicine is really created, the strength of the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao will skyrocket amazingly. Therefore, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is now eager to kill Xu Guang, but Xu Guang is heavily protected, and it is difficult to be killed!"

"Ye Domain Lord, this task has been abandoned, and it is almost impossible to complete!" Su Ya persuaded.

"I'll try, it's a big deal to lose a clone. "

Ye Tiandao.

Seeing this, Su Ya didn't say anything.

......

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian took the task and obtained the two items needed for the task.

Even if it is a direct mission, some things will be prepared, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will not refuse to give it, even the Qin clan will not dare to do so.

The first item is the Supreme Blood Void Bead, which can turn his body into a Supreme Dao Void Demon, but when encountering a Supreme Dao Void Demon that surpasses the Ninefold Dao Realm, it is still easy to see through.

The second item is a special drop of blood of the Xu clan, through which Xu Guang's location can be sensed.

Soon.

He received the two items, and then prepared to infiltrate the Heavenly Blood Vein of the Dao Void Demon.

The other side.

Qin.

Qin Ming received the news, Ye Tian took the task and went to the Dao Void Demon's side.

"Ye Tian really dares to take on this task, this time, his clone is designated, maybe he will be angry with the Dao Void Demon Heavenly Blood Bloodline, and in the future, even if he has more clones, it will be extremely troublesome!" Qin Ming sneered.

......

Imaginary domain.

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't really use the Blood Xuanzhu to infiltrate the Supreme Dao Void Demon, that was looking for death.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian copied a Supreme Dao Void Demon body, and then handed over that drop of Xu Clan's special blood to this replica body, which allowed this Supreme Dao Void Demon Replica Body to sneak into the territory of the Supreme Dao Void Demon side.

This is better than the Blood Bead and is not easy to find.

This mission is very pitiful, but Ye Tian is also ready to take the opportunity to go to the Dao Void Demon side to plunder some resources, and it is not in vain to come on this trip.

"You have to mix in the Heavenly Blood vein step by step. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

In the following days, he entered a tribe of Supreme Dao Void Demons, and then tried to contact the Heavenly Blood One Vein of the Heavenly Blood Void Demon as the tribe's Supreme Dao Void Demon, investigated the identity and status of some Heavenly Blood One Vein Dao Void Demons, and chose a suitable target to kill them, so as to replace the identity of the other party.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a suitable target.

The Heavenly Blood is one vein, the Highest Dao Void Demon Blood Huangzi, and the Sixfold Dao Void Demon, but the bloodline is weak and the combat effectiveness is not strong.

Blood Huangzi's identity is not ordinary, he is the heir of a ninefold supreme Dao Void Demon, but he is only one of many heirs.

"This blood hero is not guarded by a strong man, and he is also very withdrawn, kill him, quickly copy his body, and replace his identity!"

Ye Tian decided.

In this way, he will find a way to make the Blood Huangzi grow up, get the attention of the Heavenly Blood One Vein, and then mix into the core area of the Heavenly Blood One Vein to find that Dan Emperor.

In this way, it is possible to complete the task, and there is also hope to use the identity of the Blood Huangzi to obtain the resources of the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Maybe you're lucky, and there's hope for a fourth-order rule item with low quality and high side effects!
